injuries.comment: Trocheck is considered a game-time decision for Monday's (Nov. 24) game against the Blues due to an undisclosed injury, as per Vince Z. Mercogliano of The Athletic.
Quick isn't expected to be in the lineup for Monday's (Nov. 24) home game against St. Louis, as per Vince Z. Mercogliano of The Athletic reports.
Miller won't play against St. Louis on Monday (Nov. 24), as per Colin Stephenson of Newsday.
